Optimized prompt-engineering workflows, improving response relevance and reducing hallucinations in knowledge retrieval tasks.
Analyzed and compared regression and classification algorithms to determine optimal models for structured datasets.
Applied statistical validation techniques (precision, recall, classification reports) to ensure data-driven algorithm selection.
Optimized models with GridSearchCV hyperparameter tuning, achieving >90% accuracy with Logistic Regression.
